proofs.control: Submission timestamps are accurate and consistent

evidence.notes: created_at is set by Supabase default (now()) — not client-supplied

proofs.notes: All 100 picks have valid server-generated timestamps. No future timestamps, no nulls. Timestamps are Supabase-generated (default: now()), not client-supplied.

evidence.validation_approach: Pure type coercion in coerceSubmissionPayload() — readString, readOptionalNumber, readOptionalString

proofs.notes: Validation uses pure type coercion functions with no randomness, no external calls, and no time-dependency. Same input always produces same validation result. Governance brake adds deterministic source-based gating for autonomous submissions.

proofs.control: Capper attribution is correct and immutable

evidence.jwt_enforcement: auth.capperId overrides form submittedBy when role=capper (submit-pick.ts:47)
evidence.immutability: source column has no UPDATE path in submission-service — set once at creation
evidence.trust_boundary: UTV2-658: capper identity is server-enforced via JWT, not client-editable

proofs.notes: All 200 picks have non-null source attribution. Source is set at creation and has no update path. JWT claim overrides client-supplied submittedBy for capper role (UTV2-658).

proofs.control: Smart Form enforces required fields and formats

enforcement_layers: Smart Form: React state + HTML required attributes
Controller: ApiError on pick creation failure
Database: NOT NULL constraints on critical columns

proofs.notes: All 200 picks have non-empty market and source fields. Enforcement operates at 4 layers: Smart Form UI, API handler type coercion, controller error handling, and database NOT NULL constraints.
